description: Style Noteglobal desi is the latest in Indian ethnic fusion wear for the international fashionista who loves an Indian twist in her ensemble. Fresh off the brand's design studio, wear this unique piece with tonal leggings or colour block it with bright capris. Check out myntra's collection of ethnic sandals that could go with this lovely Global Desi piece!Product DetailsMustard and green printed tunic that has a shirt collar with a split neckline, full buttoned placket, yoke on the chest, pin tucks from the yoke down on either sides of the placket and three quarter sleevesMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean firstThereafter hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decoratiionsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
